author: nero_eth
content: Imo, we should still push for this (8237) in glamsterdam, otherwise hegota. Right now, my feeling is that mandatory proofs are still far away (at least 2-3 years) and it's worth to improve on the status quo of today. Glamsterdam will already come with a significant sync improvement on the EL (snap/2) and the CL could leverage the fact that we don't necessarily need to download payloads anymore too, making glam THE fork improving not only on scaling but also on sync.
